trigger.description: Search considered at least 3 candidates but kept under 30% after applying the relevance floor. Informational so an agent can decide whether to widen the query.
setup_commands: ee remember 'Use cargo fmt before release.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule
ee remember 'Database connection pooling guide.' --workspace . --level semantic --kind fact
ee remember 'Migration 0042 added user_email column.' --workspace . --level episodic --kind decision
ee remember 'Run clippy --all-targets before push.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule
